## Layer

Which of Cadence's four layers does this fit into?

- [ ] Layer 1 — Patterns (new pattern, ADR-worthy)
- [ ] Layer 2 — Process (DoD, ROLE_SPECS, TEAM_PROTOCOL)
- [ ] Layer 3 — Automated gates (lint, boundary check, verify script)
- [ ] Layer 4 — Launch (template, recipe, scaffolding)
